title: If Anno did Evangelion style psychoanalyses of popular anime characters would you watch it
display_title: If Anno did Evangelion style psychoanalyses of popular anime characters would you watch it
wikitext:
[]: If Anno did Evangelion-style psychoanalyses of popular anime characters, would you watch it?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Tue Mar 31, 2026 4:52 pm Imagine the likes of Vegeta, Naruto, Ichigo, Amuro (OG Gundam), Luffy, Inuyasha, Ranma, Ryuko (Tenshi Muyo), and Aisha Clan Clan (Outlaw Star) in foldable metal chairs sitting and looking depressed while a disembodied voice asks them rhetorical questions about their innermost insecurities, fears, and what drives them. Fanfiction basically but Anno writes them. Would you watch it?

[]: Re: If Anno did Evangelion-style psychoanalyses of popular anime characters, would you watch it?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Apr 02, 2026 9:14 am I would only be interested in that if was supposed to be funny, not serious. For instance Vegeta could start beligerantly arguing with the questioner. Luffy would be more interested in demanding the questioner's identity than in answering the questions. Inuyasha could try to break out of instrumentality with his Wind Scar attack, ect.

[]: If Anno did Evangelion-style psychoanalyses of popular anime characters, would you watch it?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Tue Mar 31, 2026 4:52 pm Imagine the likes of Vegeta, Naruto, Ichigo, Amuro (OG Gundam), Luffy, Inuyasha, Ranma, Ryuko (Tenshi Muyo), and Aisha Clan Clan (Outlaw Star) in foldable metal chairs sitting and looking depressed while a disembodied voice asks them rhetorical questions about their innermost insecurities, fears, and what drives them. Fanfiction basically but Anno writes them. Would you watch it?
